examples: All people, she said, lived their lives in bondage to hunger, pain and lust.
In Turnerian terminology, the frontier had furnished "a gate of escape from the bondage of the past."
The remaining partners in the law firm were still together, attached unwillingly at the hip by the bondage of mortgages and the banknotes.
Gains are gains, and clearly, betting on cheap bondage and tiny takeovers was not such a stupid idea.
India and Pakistan have banned debt bondage but struggle to enforce the law.
